title: Agentic Workspace local chat checkpoint
description: Ignored local-only continuity checkpoint used to rehydrate a chat after compaction or resume without treating local notes as closure evidence.

created_at.description: ISO-like UTC timestamp for the first checkpoint write.

updated_at.description: ISO-like UTC timestamp for the most recent checkpoint write.

task.description: Short current task summary suitable for startup projection.

branch.description: Current git branch at checkpoint write time.

current_pr.description: Current pull request number or URL when known.

items.description: One issue reference associated with the current task.

current_issue_refs.description: Issue references associated with the current task.

items.description: One durable source to reread before trusting local checkpoint state.

durable_sources.description: Durable sources that should be reread on resume.

resume_rule.description: Human-readable rule reminding agents that local checkpoints are advisory and durable sources remain authoritative.

items.description: One recently run proof command or receipt summary.

last_proof.description: Recently run proof commands or receipt summaries.

items.description: One unresolved blocker to re-check after resume.

open_blockers.description: Unresolved blockers to re-check after resume.

dirty_state_summary.description: Short summary of local dirty state at checkpoint write time.

next_safe_command.description: Next safe command to run after resume.

limits.description: Invariant flags that make the local-only and non-evidence limits explicit.

local_only.description: Checkpoint is only for the local workspace.

gitignored.description: Checkpoint must remain in an ignored local path.

not_closure_evidence.description: Checkpoint cannot prove issue or pull request closure.

no_raw_transcripts.description: Checkpoint must not store raw chat transcript content.

no_secrets.description: Checkpoint must not store secrets or authentication material.

durable_decisions_require_durable_source.description: Durable decisions must be backed by durable sources outside this checkpoint.
